headline: Ted Turner, media mogul who revolutionised TV news by launching CNN, dies at 87
summary: The media mogul pioneered the modern 24-hour news culture when he launched the Cable News Network in 1980.

headline: Israel strikes Beirut for first time since Hezbollah ceasefire
summary: Israel says it targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in the capital, the first strike of its kind since mid-April.

headline: DR Congo president hints at extending his term and delaying polls
summary: President Felix Tshisekedi says 'If the people want me to have a third term, I will accept,' angering opposition who accuse him of planning to break constitutional mandate limits.

headline: Shell latest oil giant to see profits surge due to Iran war impact
summary: The energy giant's profits jump by nearly a quarter as it benefits from recent volatility in the oil price caused by Middle East conflict.

headline: Dozens of passengers left hantavirus-stricken cruise ship after 1st fatality
summary: Oceanwide Expeditions revealed 29 passengers disembarked from a cruise ship hit by a hantavirus outbreak on April 24; countries worldwide are scrambling to prevent further spread.

headline: Trump administration sows confusion as it tries to reopen Strait of Hormuz
summary: Mixed messaging and contradictions emerge as the U.S. attempts to address the blockade affecting global oil shipping.

headline: Poland warns Russia is moving from low-cost recruits to professional sabotage cells
summary: Polish officials report Russia and Belarus are escalating espionage and hybrid warfare tactics.

headline: Hungary returns seized cash and gold shipment worth $82 million to Ukraine
summary: Hungarian authorities return seized assets to Ukraine amid ongoing regional tensions.

headline: African countries warn migrants in South Africa to remain indoors due to xenophobic attacks
summary: Kenya, Malawi, Lesotho and Zimbabwe have warned their citizens; Ghana has lobbied the African Union for action.

headline: Southeast Asian foreign ministers agree to virtual meeting with Myanmar counterpart
summary: Myanmar seeks to re-engage with ASEAN after five years on the sidelines.
